textPlain: I think paper-folding machines are something of a lost art. They’ve been around for literally centuries at this point, but there are so many interesting and useful things that can be made out of paper. Everything from packaging to envelopes to origami.I wish there were smaller, cheaper versions on the market.
Their auto aiming trash can video is very interesting https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H0XYANRosVo
